tagline: AI-powered news agency that detects newsworthy facts from Data360's 12,000 indicators and delivers them verified with local perspective to LAC newsrooms.
ui.empty_help: The home page will show newsworthy facts here as the agent detects them.

quality.rejected.title: Verification failed
quality.rejected.body: This piece did not pass mechanical data checks. Do not publish the figures without reviewing the original source.
onboard.title: Welcome to Data360 News Agent
onboard.intro: AI-powered news agency that detects newsworthy facts from Data360's 12,000 indicators and delivers them verified with local perspective to LAC newsrooms.
onboard.feature_1: Country home page with featured reports, headlines and updated indicators
onboard.feature_2: Abrupt change and cross-country anomaly detection
onboard.feature_3: Bilingual stories and features with source traceability (PCN)
onboard.feature_4: Local press context to enrich investigative features
onboard.feature_5: Per-story chat to dig deeper into data and sources
newsletter.title: Daily LAC newsletter
newsletter.intro: Daily email for allied newsrooms across Latin America and the Caribbean: the most newsworthy finding of the day among Data360 indicators the agent watches, with a verified narrative and link to source.
newsletter.feature_1: One fact per day — the change ranked highest by statistical magnitude, inverse media coverage and regional weight (the product's daily "facts of the day" bot).
newsletter.feature_2: Orphan indicators: data updated in LAC that no outlet covered — flagship sustainability use case ("12 data points changed and nobody reported them").
newsletter.feature_3: Every claim traceable to data360.worldbank.org (verification trace / PCN).
newsletter.audience: Distribution layer of the news agency for newsrooms such as Quinto Elemento Lab, Animal Político and Ojoconmipisto.
newsletter.demo_note: In this demo the button does not subscribe or send email (D-009). Daily delivery and continuous monitoring of all 12,000 indicators are on the roadmap.
about.title: About the demo
about.lead: Data360 News Agent is Abrimos.info's Global Challenge phase 2 demo: an AI news agency over Data360 indicators that detects newsworthy facts and delivers them verified with local perspective to LAC newsrooms.
about.what_body: An AI-powered news agency that watches economic, social and governance indicators in Guatemala, Honduras, Argentina, Ecuador and Mexico. When it detects a statistically notable fact, it publishes verified Stories and Features — every claim linked to its source at data360.worldbank.org.
about.scope_body: Covers strategies 1 (abrupt changes, z-score) and 4 (cross-indicator anomalies across countries). Runs in replay mode over historical CSV snapshots, not real-time. The watchlist includes ~35 indicators in three tiers: pulse (sub-annual), annual and forecast.
about.method_body: Pipeline: Data360 series fetch → statistical detection → numbered omnibus context (methodology, series, local press, rules, candidates) → one LLM call per indicator → Q1–Q7 validation and claim traceability (PCN) → data/alerts.json consumed by the home page and per-story chat.
about.feature_1: Country home page with featured reports, headlines and updated indicators
about.feature_2: Article view with sparkline, bilingual narrative (ES or EN) and Data360 traceability
about.feature_3: Data period highlighted; feed sorted by observation period
about.feature_5: Per-story chat to dig deeper into data and sources; MD/PDF export
about.verify_body: Each alert includes a verification_trace with Data360 dataset link, CSV download and methodology reference. claim_tokens bind numeric statements to the LLM's numbered context.
about.limit_1: No NiFi or OpenSearch in the demo; local CSV data
about.limit_2: Bounded watchlist (~35 indicators), not all 12,000 Data360 indicators
about.limit_4: Data360 MCP is optional (local server); chat falls back to REST if MCP is unavailable
about.limit_5: Headlines via GDELT in Spanish only; Google News RSS is not implemented
about.limit_7: Per-indicator analysis can take minutes; chat requires an LLM with tool support
about.roadmap_body: Strategy 2 (narrative-data divergence), NiFi orchestration, OpenSearch as canonical store, continuous monitoring.
about.team_body: This demo was built by Abrimos.info, a virtual distributed organization — incorporated in Mexico — working from and for Latin America with a global outlook. We build digital infrastructure with verified information for democracies across the region.
about.team_experience: We combine open-data expertise with narrative, investigative and software development skills. We help organizations, governments and newsrooms turn data into decision-ready insights and evidence-based storytelling. Our core platform, TeseoETL, extracts, structures, analyzes and publishes open data to counter disinformation.
chat.title: Analytic chat
chat.subtitle: Ask about indicators, alerts and headlines. The agent uses pipeline tools.
chat.empty: Pick a preset or type a question to start.
chat.freshness_help: Pick a country above, then request a chart or analysis for any indicator.
chat.freshness_more: +{n} more indicators in the full catalog.
